fields.name: query_max_scan_docs
fields.description: Max scan docs for unsafe queries (QUERY_MAX_SCAN_DOCS)

fields.name: allow_runtime_ddl_bootstrap_override
fields.description: Allow runtime schema/table bootstrap when migrations are missing. Defaults to true in development/test and false in staging/production.

fields.name: elasticsearch_default_shards
fields.description: Default number of shards for new indices (ELASTICSEARCH_DEFAULT_SHARDS)

fields.name: elasticsearch_default_replicas
fields.description: Default number of replicas for new indices (ELASTICSEARCH_DEFAULT_REPLICAS)

fields.name: oms_grpc_use_tls
fields.description: Use TLS for OMS gRPC client channels (OMS_GRPC_USE_TLS)

fields.name: oms_grpc_server_use_tls
fields.description: Use TLS for OMS gRPC server listeners (OMS_GRPC_SERVER_USE_TLS)

fields.name: oms_grpc_require_mtls
fields.description: Require mTLS client certificates for OMS gRPC server listeners (OMS_GRPC_REQUIRE_MTLS)

fields.name: oms_grpc_server_name
fields.description: SNI/server name override for OMS gRPC TLS (OMS_GRPC_SERVER_NAME)

fields.name: oms_grpc_client_ca_path
fields.description: CA bundle path for OMS gRPC client TLS (OMS_GRPC_CLIENT_CA_PATH; fallback SSL_CA_PATH)

fields.name: oms_grpc_client_cert_path
fields.description: Client cert path for OMS gRPC mTLS (OMS_GRPC_CLIENT_CERT_PATH)

fields.name: oms_grpc_client_key_path
fields.description: Client key path for OMS gRPC mTLS (OMS_GRPC_CLIENT_KEY_PATH)

fields.name: oms_grpc_server_cert_path
fields.description: Server cert path for OMS gRPC TLS (OMS_GRPC_SERVER_CERT_PATH; fallback SSL_CERT_PATH)

fields.name: oms_grpc_server_key_path
fields.description: Server key path for OMS gRPC TLS (OMS_GRPC_SERVER_KEY_PATH; fallback SSL_KEY_PATH)

fields.name: oms_grpc_server_ca_path
fields.description: CA bundle path for OMS gRPC server mTLS (OMS_GRPC_SERVER_CA_PATH; fallback SSL_CA_PATH)

fields.name: cors_origins
fields.description: CORS allowed origins (JSON array string; CORS_ORIGINS). When unset, defaults apply.

fields.name: funnel_excel_timeout_seconds
fields.description: Funnel excel timeout seconds (FUNNEL_EXCEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS; fallback FUNNEL_CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)

fields.name: funnel_infer_timeout_seconds
fields.description: Funnel dataset analysis timeout seconds (FUNNEL_INFER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS; fallback FUNNEL_CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)

fields.name: foundry_connectivity_jdbc_db_allowlist
fields.description: Comma-separated ontology DB allowlist for JDBC connectivity when global flag is off (FOUNDRY_CONNECTIVITY_JDBC_DB_ALLOWLIST)

fields.name: foundry_connectivity_cdc_db_allowlist
fields.description: Comma-separated ontology DB allowlist for CDC mode when global flag is off (FOUNDRY_CONNECTIVITY_CDC_DB_ALLOWLIST)

fields.name: fallback_branches
fields.description: Comma-separated fallback branches for dataset resolution (PIPELINE_FALLBACK_BRANCHES)

fields.name: publish_lock_acquire_timeout_seconds
fields.description: BFF publish lock acquire timeout seconds (PIPELINE_PUBLISH_LOCK_ACQUIRE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS; fallback PIPELINE_LOCK_ACQUIRE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)

fields.name: lakefs_diff_enabled
fields.description: Enable lakeFS diff during pipeline execution (PIPELINE_LAKEFS_DIFF_ENABLED)

fields.name: spark_streaming_enabled
fields.description: Enable Spark Structured Streaming input mode (PIPELINE_SPARK_STREAMING_ENABLED)

fields.name: spark_streaming_default_trigger
fields.description: Default trigger for streaming external inputs: available_now|once (PIPELINE_SPARK_STREAMING_DEFAULT_TRIGGER)

fields.name: spark_streaming_await_timeout_seconds
fields.description: Streaming query await timeout seconds for external inputs (PIPELINE_SPARK_STREAMING_AWAIT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)

fields.name: kafka_schema_registry_timeout_seconds
fields.description: HTTP timeout seconds for kafka AVRO schema-registry resolution (PIPELINE_KAFKA_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)

fields.name: udf_require_reference
fields.description: Require UDF metadata to use udfId(+udfVersion) without inline udfCode (PIPELINE_UDF_REQUIRE_REFERENCE)

fields.name: udf_require_version_pinning
fields.description: Require udfVersion pinning for UDF transforms during validation/preflight (PIPELINE_UDF_REQUIRE_VERSION_PINNING)

fields.name: udf_preflight_require_existence
fields.description: Require preflight to verify UDF reference existence/version in registry (PIPELINE_UDF_PREFLIGHT_REQUIRE_EXISTENCE)

fields.name: udf_spark_parity_enabled
fields.description: Enable Spark execution parity for UDF transforms (PIPELINE_UDF_SPARK_PARITY_ENABLED)

fields.name: preflight_fail_closed
fields.description: Fail closed when pipeline preflight throws internal errors (PIPELINE_PREFLIGHT_FAIL_CLOSED)

fields.name: jobs_backoff_base_seconds
fields.description: Pipeline job retry backoff base seconds (PIPELINE_JOBS_BACKOFF_BASE_SECONDS)

fields.name: jobs_backoff_max_seconds
fields.description: Pipeline job retry backoff max seconds (PIPELINE_JOBS_BACKOFF_MAX_SECONDS)

fields.name: jobs_max_poll_interval_ms
fields.description: Kafka max.poll.interval.ms for pipeline worker jobs (PIPELINE_JOBS_MAX_POLL_INTERVAL_MS)

fields.name: processed_event_lease_timeout_seconds
fields.description: Processed-event lease timeout seconds for pipeline worker idempotency (PIPELINE_PROCESSED_EVENT_LEASE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)

fields.name: require_health_gate
fields.description: Require health gate for destructive ops (ONTOLOGY_REQUIRE_HEALTH_GATE)

fields.name: search_around_spark_threshold
fields.description: Search Around request object-count threshold for Spark on-demand routing (ONTOLOGY_SEARCH_AROUND_SPARK_THRESHOLD)

fields.name: writeback_spark_threshold
fields.description: Writeback request object-count threshold for Spark on-demand routing (ONTOLOGY_WRITEBACK_SPARK_THRESHOLD)

fields.name: allow_implicit_primary_key
fields.description: Allow implicit primary key (ONTOLOGY_ALLOW_IMPLICIT_PRIMARY_KEY). When unset, defaults to false in production and on protected branches requiring proposals.

fields.name: allow_implicit_title_key
fields.description: Allow implicit title key (ONTOLOGY_ALLOW_IMPLICIT_TITLE_KEY). When unset, defaults to false in production and on protected branches requiring proposals.

fields.name: bff_admin_token
fields.description: BFF admin token(s), comma-separated for rotation (BFF_ADMIN_TOKEN)

fields.name: bff_write_token
fields.description: BFF write token(s), comma-separated for rotation (BFF_WRITE_TOKEN)

fields.name: bff_agent_token
fields.description: BFF internal agent token(s), comma-separated for rotation (BFF_AGENT_TOKEN)

fields.name: oms_admin_token
fields.description: OMS admin token(s), comma-separated for rotation (OMS_ADMIN_TOKEN)

fields.name: oms_write_token
fields.description: OMS write token(s), comma-separated for rotation (OMS_WRITE_TOKEN)

fields.name: admin_api_key
fields.description: Unified admin API key(s), comma-separated for rotation (ADMIN_API_KEY)

fields.name: admin_token
fields.description: Unified admin token(s), comma-separated for rotation (ADMIN_TOKEN)

fields.name: user_jwt_public_key
fields.description: PEM public key for JWT verification (USER_JWT_PUBLIC_KEY)

fields.name: user_jwt_hs256_secret
fields.description: HS256 shared secret(s), comma-separated for rotation (USER_JWT_HS256_SECRET)

fields.name: auth_users
fields.description: JSON user list for local auth (AUTH_USERS)

fields.name: bff_require_db_scope
fields.description: Require db scope headers for BFF writes (BFF_REQUIRE_DB_SCOPE)

fields.name: bff_require_db_access
fields.description: Require database access roles for BFF writes (BFF_REQUIRE_DB_ACCESS)

fields.name: dev_master_auth_enabled
fields.description: Development-only: allow bypassing auth failures by attaching a master principal (DEV_MASTER_AUTH_ENABLED)

fields.name: dev_master_roles
fields.description: Development-only: comma-separated roles for the master principal (DEV_MASTER_ROLES)

fields.name: oms_grpc_service_token
fields.description: Dedicated client token for OMS gRPC bridge calls (OMS_GRPC_SERVICE_TOKEN)

fields.name: oms_grpc_service_tokens
fields.description: Dedicated allowed token list for OMS gRPC bridge server (OMS_GRPC_SERVICE_TOKENS)

fields.name: instance_events_topic
fields.description: Kafka topic for instance domain events (INSTANCE_EVENTS_TOPIC)

fields.name: ontology_events_topic
fields.description: Kafka topic for ontology domain events (ONTOLOGY_EVENTS_TOPIC)

fields.name: projection_dlq_topic
fields.description: Kafka DLQ topic for projection failures (PROJECTION_DLQ_TOPIC)

fields.name: connector_updates_dlq_topic
fields.description: Kafka DLQ topic for connector updates (CONNECTOR_UPDATES_DLQ_TOPIC)

fields.name: pipeline_jobs_dlq_topic
fields.description: Kafka DLQ topic for pipeline jobs (PIPELINE_JOBS_DLQ_TOPIC)

fields.name: pipeline_events_topic
fields.description: Kafka topic for pipeline control-plane events (PIPELINE_EVENTS_TOPIC)

fields.name: dataset_ingest_outbox_dlq_topic
fields.description: Kafka DLQ topic for dataset ingest outbox (DATASET_INGEST_OUTBOX_DLQ_TOPIC)

fields.name: objectify_jobs_dlq_topic
fields.description: Kafka DLQ topic for objectify jobs (OBJECTIFY_JOBS_DLQ_TOPIC)

fields.name: instance_commands_dlq_topic
fields.description: Kafka DLQ topic for instance commands (INSTANCE_COMMANDS_DLQ_TOPIC)

fields.name: ontology_commands_dlq_topic
fields.description: Kafka DLQ topic for ontology commands (ONTOLOGY_COMMANDS_DLQ_TOPIC)

fields.name: action_commands_dlq_topic
fields.description: Kafka DLQ topic for action commands (ACTION_COMMANDS_DLQ_TOPIC)

fields.name: projection_worker_group
fields.description: Kafka consumer group for projection worker (PROJECTION_WORKER_GROUP)

fields.name: message_relay_group
fields.description: Kafka consumer group for message relay (MESSAGE_RELAY_GROUP)

fields.name: instance_worker_group
fields.description: Kafka consumer group for instance worker (INSTANCE_WORKER_GROUP)

fields.name: ontology_worker_group
fields.description: Kafka consumer group for ontology worker (ONTOLOGY_WORKER_GROUP)

fields.name: action_worker_group
fields.description: Kafka consumer group for action worker (ACTION_WORKER_GROUP)

fields.name: objectify_jobs_group
fields.description: Kafka consumer group for objectify jobs (OBJECTIFY_JOBS_GROUP)

fields.name: minio_ssl_verify
fields.description: Verify SSL certificates for MinIO/S3 when using https (MINIO_SSL_VERIFY). When unset, botocore defaults apply.

fields.name: minio_ssl_ca_bundle
fields.description: CA bundle path for MinIO/S3 TLS verification (MINIO_SSL_CA_BUNDLE).

fields.name: lakefs_s3_endpoint_url
fields.description: lakeFS S3 gateway endpoint URL (e.g. http://localhost:8000)

fields.name: lakefs_api_port
fields.description: lakeFS API port (used when LAKEFS_API_URL is unset)

fields.name: lakefs_s3_ssl_verify
fields.description: Verify SSL certificates for lakeFS S3 gateway when using https (LAKEFS_S3_SSL_VERIFY).

fields.name: lakefs_s3_ssl_ca_bundle
fields.description: CA bundle path for lakeFS S3 gateway TLS verification (LAKEFS_S3_SSL_CA_BUNDLE).

fields.name: lakefs_client_timeout_seconds
fields.description: lakeFS REST client timeout seconds (LAKEFS_CLIENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS; fallback LAKEFS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)

fields.name: lakefs_credentials_source
fields.description: Where to load lakeFS credentials from (LAKEFS_CREDENTIALS_SOURCE: env|db)

fields.name: lakefs_service_principal
fields.description: Service principal identifier for lakeFS credentials (LAKEFS_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL)

fields.name: lakefs_credentials_encryption_key
fields.description: Fernet key for encrypting lakeFS secrets in Postgres (LAKEFS_CREDENTIALS_ENCRYPTION_KEY)

fields.name: event_store_bucket
fields.description: S3 bucket for immutable event store (EVENT_STORE_BUCKET)

fields.name: timeseries_bucket
fields.description: S3 bucket for time series property data (TIMESERIES_BUCKET)

fields.name: attachments_bucket
fields.description: S3 bucket for attachment property files (ATTACHMENTS_BUCKET)

fields.name: event_store_require_tls
fields.description: Require TLS for event store endpoint (EVENT_STORE_REQUIRE_TLS)

fields.name: event_store_ssl_verify
fields.description: Verify TLS certs for event store (EVENT_STORE_SSL_VERIFY)

fields.name: base_branch
fields.description: Base branch to seed OCC when branch has no local events (BRANCH_VIRTUALIZATION_BASE_BRANCH)

fields.name: ontology_writeback_dataset_id
fields.description: Optional dataset id for writeback scope (ONTOLOGY_WRITEBACK_DATASET_ID)

fields.name: writeback_enforce_action_data_access
fields.description: Enforce action target data_access policy checks on submit/simulate/worker (WRITEBACK_ENFORCE_ACTION_DATA_ACCESS)

fields.name: writeback_read_overlay
fields.description: Enable overlay reads from lakeFS branches (WRITEBACK_READ_OVERLAY)

fields.name: writeback_enabled_object_types
fields.description: Comma-separated allowed object types for writeback/overlay (WRITEBACK_ENABLED_OBJECT_TYPES)

fields.name: writeback_dataset_acl_scope
fields.description: ACL scope name for writeback dataset access (WRITEBACK_DATASET_ACL_SCOPE)

fields.name: writeback_submission_snapshot_max_targets
fields.description: Max targets to snapshot during writeback submission (WRITEBACK_SUBMISSION_SNAPSHOT_MAX_TARGETS)

classes.name: ApplicationSettings
classes.docstring: Main application settings - aggregates all other settings
